nasb.text: Be ashamed, O farmers, Wail, O vinedressers, For the wheat and the barley; Because the harvest of the field is destroyed.

esv.text: Be ashamed, O tillers of the soil; wail, O vinedressers, for the wheat and the barley, because the harvest of the field has perished.

cnv.text: 農夫啊！你們要為大麥和小麥羞愧。 修理葡萄園的啊！你們要哀號， 因為田間的莊稼都破壞了。

ccb.text: 农夫啊，你们要忧伤！ 照料葡萄园的人啊， 你们要哀号！ 因为田间的大麦和小麦全毁了。
